'''ngapapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:moabi|moabi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moabi|moabi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngapapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæpæpæth|ngæpæpæth]] || [[word:ngæpæpæj|ngæpæpæj]] || [[word:ngæpæpæsh|ngæpæpæsh]] || [[word:ngæpæpæ|ngæpæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngapapapath|ngapapapath]] || [[word:ngapapapaj|ngapapapaj]] || [[word:ngapapapash|ngapapapash]] || [[word:ngapapapa|ngapapapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngapapath|ngapapath]] || [[word:ngapapaj|ngapapaj]] || [[word:ngapapash|ngapapash]] || [[word:ngapapa|ngapapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngapafpath|ngapafpath]] || [[word:ngapafpaj|ngapafpaj]] || [[word:ngapafpash|ngapafpash]] || [[word:ngapafpaf|ngapafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngapapatha|ngapapatha]] || [[word:ngapapaja|ngapapaja]] || [[word:ngapapasha|ngapapasha]] || [[word:ngapapaka|ngapapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngapapath|ngapapath]] || [[word:ngapapaj|ngapapaj]] || [[word:ngapapash|ngapapash]] || [[word:ngapapa|ngapapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngapapathal|ngapapathal]] || [[word:ngapapajal|ngapapajal]] || [[word:ngapapashal|ngapapashal]] || [[word:ngapapakal|ngapapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngapapathatha|ngapapathatha]] || [[word:ngapapajaja|ngapapajaja]] || [[word:ngapapashasha|ngapapashasha]] || [[word:ngapapaka|ngapapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngapapathan|ngapapathan]] || [[word:ngapapajan|ngapapajan]] || [[word:ngapapashan|ngapapashan]] || [[word:ngapapakan|ngapapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngapapathaoro|ngapapathaoro]] || [[word:ngapapajaoro|ngapapajaoro]] || [[word:ngapapashaoro|ngapapashaoro]] || [[word:ngapapakaoro|ngapapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
